title: dolichocentrum superans
side_effects: Dolichocentrum superans can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its toxic alkaloids. Overexposure to the plant's compounds may also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of Dolichocentrum superans can lead to more serious health complications, including cardiovascular problems and allergic reactions. If not handled with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional, the plant's side effects can be detrimental to one's health.
